question_text: Which of the following is the main disadvantage of using solar panels to generate electricity in the UK?

options.label: A
options.text: They produce no electricity at night and generate less in winter when days are shorter

options.label: B
options.text: They cause pollution when manufacturing the panels

options.label: C
options.text: They require constant fuel input like fossil fuels do

options.label: D
options.text: They are too heavy to install on most buildings

explanation: The UK has limited sunlight, especially in winter, so solar panels are less reliable here than in sunnier countries. This intermittency is a key challenge for renewable energy sources in the UK.
